title: New villagers!
description: New vanilla textures and random variations for villagers.
body:
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1e9c4642abb6d149ebcb8931fe6a5fbd2cffe6dd_0.webp)

What's new? 
1. Added new vanilla texture and random variations for villagers. 
2. New texture for villager children. 
3. Redrawn professions and biome types textures. 
4. Three new biome types: Mushroom Fields, Dark Forest, Badlands. 
5. Redrawn Wandering Trader texture. 
6. Redrawn Witch texture. 
7. Redrawn Evoker texture. (+ added emissive eye texture) 
8. Redrawn Pillager texture. 
9. Redrawn Vindicator texture.

Screenshots in gallery
